meta.note: Signup bonus amounts fluctuate frequently. Always verify current offers on issuer's official website before presenting to users. Fields marked with 'high_volatility: true' change most often.

chase_ur.name: Chase Ultimate Rewards
chase_ur.note: Points Boost offers on Chase Travel can reach 1.75cpp for select premium cabin bookings. Transfer to airline/hotel partners 1:1.

amex_mr.name: Amex Membership Rewards
amex_mr.note: Transfer to 20+ airline and hotel partners at 1:1 (Hilton is 1:2). Best value via transfer partners.

citi_ty.name: Citi ThankYou Points
citi_ty.note: Transfer to airline partners. Best value via transfer partners.

capital_one_miles.name: Capital One Miles
capital_one_miles.note: Transfer to 15+ airline and hotel partners. Can also redeem as travel statement credits at 1cpp.

bilt_points.name: Bilt Points
bilt_points.note: Transfer to airlines (United, AA, Air Canada) and hotels (Hyatt). One of the highest-value transferable currencies.

marriott_bonvoy.name: Marriott Bonvoy Points
marriott_bonvoy.note: Best value redeeming for Marriott hotel stays. Transfer to airlines at 3:1 with 5k bonus per 60k transferred.

delta_skymiles.name: Delta SkyMiles
delta_skymiles.note: No-expiry miles. Variable redemption value; best on international business class.

hilton_honors.name: Hilton Honors Points
hilton_honors.note: Low cpp but high earn rates. Best value at premium Hilton properties.

cash.name: Cash Back
cash.note: Straightforward cash back. No transfer partners.

cards.name: Chase Sapphire Preferred

signup_bonus.note: Was 60k/$4k as recently as early 2026. Check issuer site for current offer.

eligibility_notes: Subject to Chase 5/24 rule
Cannot hold both Preferred and Reserve simultaneously (historically), though rules changed Jan 2026 — verify current policy
48-month waiting period between Sapphire family bonuses
notes: 5x on travel booked via Chase Travel portal (excluding $50 hotel credit)
3x on dining, select streaming, and online groceries (excl. Target, Walmart, wholesale clubs)
10% anniversary points boost on all purchases made previous year
Strong travel protections: trip cancellation, primary rental car insurance, baggage delay

cards.name: Chase Sapphire Reserve

signup_bonus.note: Fee and bonus restructured mid-2025. Verify current offer on Chase site.

eligibility_notes: Subject to Chase 5/24 rule
Annual fee increased from $550 to $795 in mid-2025 — significantly higher than data may suggest
48-month waiting period between Sapphire family bonuses
notes: 8x on all Chase Travel portal purchases (incl. The Edit)
4x on flights and hotels booked direct with airlines/hotels
3x on dining worldwide and all other travel
$300 travel credit auto-applies to any travel purchase — very flexible
$500 The Edit credit ($250 semi-annually) for hand-picked hotel collection, 2-night minimum
Priority Pass + Chase Sapphire Lounge access (with 2 guests)
Best paired with Freedom Flex or Freedom Unlimited to maximize UR ecosystem

cards.name: Chase Freedom Unlimited
notes: 1.5x on all other purchases makes it the best catch-all Chase card
3x on dining and pharmacy; 5x via Chase Travel portal
Best used as companion to Sapphire Preferred/Reserve — transfers UR points to travel partners
Has foreign transaction fee — do not use abroad

cards.name: Chase Freedom Flex
notes: 5% on rotating quarterly categories up to $1,500/quarter after activation (gas, groceries, Amazon, PayPal, etc.)
3x on dining and pharmacy year-round
Requires tracking and activating quarterly categories — not set-and-forget
Best paired with Sapphire Preferred/Reserve to unlock partner transfers
Has foreign transaction fee — do not use abroad

cards.name: Amazon Prime Visa

signup_bonus.note: Instant $100 gift card upon approval, no spend requirement

eligibility_notes: Requires active Amazon Prime membership ($139/year)
notes: 5% at Amazon.com and Whole Foods Market
2% at restaurants, gas stations, and transit
Best card for heavy Amazon/Whole Foods shoppers
Cash back deposited directly to Amazon account or as statement credit

cards.name: Chase Ink Business Preferred
eligibility_notes: Business card — requires business income (freelance, side income qualifies)
Subject to Chase 5/24 rule
notes: 3x on travel, shipping, online advertising, and internet/cable/phone (up to $150k/year combined)
SaaS software (Figma, AWS, Adobe CC) may only earn 3x if classified under 'internet/cable/phone services' — verify that your vendors' merchant codes trigger the bonus before relying on this rate
One of the best business card signup bonuses available
Points transfer to same Chase travel partners as Sapphire cards

cards.name: Chase Marriott Bonvoy Boundless
notes: 6x at Marriott properties
3x on first $6k/year in grocery purchases
One free night award annually (up to 35k points) — can offset annual fee alone
15 Elite Night Credits per year toward Marriott status
Best card if you regularly stay at Marriott properties

cards.name: Amex Platinum

signup_bonus.note: Offer is 'as high as 175k' — actual offer varies per applicant. Annual fee increased from $695 to $895 in late 2025.

cards.effective_annual_fee_note: Headline fee $895, but $600+ in travel credits plus lifestyle credits make effective fee much lower for heavy users
eligibility_notes: Once-per-lifetime bonus rule — if you've had Amex Platinum before, likely ineligible for welcome bonus
Amex uses soft pull to show offer before hard inquiry — check offer before committing
notes: 5x on flights booked directly with airlines or via Amex Travel (up to $500k/year)
5x on prepaid hotels via Amex Travel
Access to 1,550+ lounges: Centurion Lounges, Priority Pass, Delta Sky Club (10 visits/year when flying Delta), Plaza Premium
Marriott and Hilton Gold status complimentary
Annual fee increased significantly in 2025 — only worth it if you maximize multiple credits
Best for frequent travelers who will actually use the Equinox, lululemon, digital entertainment, and hotel credits

cards.name: Amex Gold

signup_bonus.note: Annual fee increased from $250 to $325 in 2024. Verify current offer.

credits.dining_credit_note: $10/month at Grubhub, Cheesecake Factory, Goldbelly, Wine.com, Five Guys. Enrollment required.
credits.uber_cash_note: $10/month Uber Cash (rides and Eats in US). Must add Amex Gold to Uber app.

eligibility_notes: Amex once-per-lifetime bonus rule applies
4x groceries capped at $25,000/year at US supermarkets
notes: 4x at restaurants worldwide (no cap)
4x at US supermarkets up to $25k/year, then 1x
3x on flights booked directly with airlines or via Amex Travel
$120 dining credit + $120 Uber Cash effectively bring annual fee to ~$85 for users who maximize credits
Best dining + grocery card for MR point earners
Annual fee raised from $250 to $325 in 2024 — factor this into calculation

cards.name: Amex Blue Cash Preferred
eligibility_notes: 6% grocery rate capped at $6,000/year at US supermarkets, then 1%
notes: 6% at US supermarkets up to $6k/year — best grocery cash-back rate available
6% on select US streaming subscriptions
3% at US gas stations and transit
Best if you spend $350+/month at supermarkets — breaks even vs. Blue Cash Everyday at that level
Does not earn transferable points — pure cash back

cards.name: Amex Blue Cash Everyday
eligibility_notes: 3% grocery and gas each capped at $6,000/year, then 1%
3% online retail capped at $6,000/year
notes: No annual fee version of Blue Cash Preferred
3% at US supermarkets, gas stations, and online retail (each capped at $6k/year)
Best for moderate grocery spenders who don't want to pay annual fee

cards.name: Amex Green
notes: 3x on travel and transit worldwide (broader travel definition than many cards)
3x on dining worldwide
Effective fee near $0 if you use CLEAR+ credit — but verify CLEAR+ is useful to you first
Good entry point into Amex MR ecosystem without high annual fee

cards.name: Amex Delta SkyMiles Gold
notes: 2x on Delta flights, restaurants, and US supermarkets
Annual companion certificate for domestic economy — high value if used
First checked bag free for you and up to 8 companions on Delta flights
Annual fee waived first year
Best if you frequently fly Delta and check bags

cards.name: Amex Hilton Honors
notes: 7x at Hilton hotels, 5x at US restaurants, supermarkets, gas stations
3x on all other eligible purchases
Hilton Honors Silver status complimentary
High earn rates but low cpp on Hilton points — net value is modest
Best no-annual-fee card if you stay at Hilton properties occasionally

cards.name: Amex Hilton Honors Surpass
notes: 12x at Hilton hotels, 6x at US restaurants, supermarkets, gas
Hilton Honors Gold status — includes 80% bonus points and complimentary breakfast at some properties
10 free Priority Pass lounge visits per year
Best Hilton card for frequent Hilton stayers

cards.name: Citi Strata Premier

credits.hotel_credit_note: $100 off single hotel stay of $500+ booked via thankyou.com once per year

notes: 3x on dining, groceries, gas, hotels, and air travel — broadest 3x categories of any $95 card
Best all-around ThankYou Points earner for everyday spend
Pairs well with Citi Double Cash or Custom Cash to maximize TY ecosystem

cards.name: Citi Double Cash

signup_bonus.note: No welcome bonus — card value is in flat-rate ongoing earn

notes: 2% flat cash back everywhere: 1% when you buy + 1% when you pay
Best simple flat-rate no-annual-fee card
Earns ThankYou Points when paired with Strata Premier — unlocks transfer partners
Has foreign transaction fee — do not use abroad

cards.name: Citi Custom Cash
notes: Automatically earns 5% in your highest-spend category each billing cycle (up to $500/month in that category)
Eligible 5% categories: restaurants, gas, groceries, select travel, transit, streaming, drugstores, home improvement, fitness clubs
Great no-annual-fee companion card to maximize one focused category
Has foreign transaction fee — do not use abroad

cards.name: Citi Costco Anywhere Visa
eligibility_notes: Requires active Costco membership
notes: 4% on eligible gas worldwide up to $7,000/year, then 1% — best gas rate with no annual fee
3% at restaurants and eligible travel
2% at Costco (warehouse + costco.com)
Rewards paid out annually as Costco shop credit in February

cards.name: Capital One Venture X
notes: $300 Capital One Travel credit effectively brings annual fee to $95
10,000 anniversary bonus miles ($100 value) — card essentially pays for itself year over year
The 10x (hotels/cars) and 5x (flights) rates only apply when booking through Capital One Travel portal — direct airline or hotel bookings earn only 2x
2x on all other purchases — strong everyday earn rate
Priority Pass + Capital One Lounge access
Best premium travel card value at effective $95/year after credits

cards.name: Capital One Venture
notes: 2x miles on all purchases — simple and consistent
5x on hotels and rental cars via Capital One Travel portal
Miles can be used as travel statement credits or transferred to 15+ partners
Global Entry/TSA PreCheck credit offsets annual fee in application year

cards.name: Capital One SavorOne
notes: 3% on dining, entertainment, streaming, and groceries — strong for no annual fee
Capital One is known for approving fair-credit applicants (640–669) — one of the most accessible rewards cards
No foreign transaction fee — good card for international use
Best no-annual-fee card for dining and entertainment spenders

cards.name: Capital One Quicksilver
notes: Simple 1.5% cash back on everything — no categories to track
Capital One often approves fair-credit applicants (640–669) — good starter flat-rate card
No annual fee, no foreign transaction fee
Good starter or backup card; overshadowed by Wells Fargo Active Cash (2% flat) for most users

cards.name: Discover it Cash Back

signup_bonus.note: No traditional signup bonus. Cashback Match doubles all cash back in year 1 — equivalent to 10% on rotating categories and 2% on everything else for the first year.

notes: 5% on rotating quarterly categories (gas, groceries, restaurants, Amazon, PayPal, etc.) up to $1,500/quarter after activation
1% on everything else
Cashback Match: Discover matches ALL cash back earned in first year automatically — powerful year-1 value
One of the most fair-credit-friendly cards — Discover explicitly targets applicants with limited or fair credit history
Must activate quarterly categories to earn 5%
Typical categories: gas, groceries, restaurants, Amazon, PayPal (varies by quarter)

cards.name: Discover it Miles

signup_bonus.note: No traditional signup bonus. Miles Match in year 1 effectively makes it 3% cash back on everything.

notes: 1.5x miles on all purchases
Miles Match doubles all miles earned in year 1 — effectively 3% everywhere in year 1
Redeem for travel statement credits or cash
No transfer partners — pure cash/travel statement credit redemption

cards.name: Wells Fargo Active Cash
notes: Unlimited 2% cash back on all purchases — best flat-rate no-annual-fee card alongside Citi Double Cash
No annual fee, no foreign transaction fee
Cell phone protection up to $600 (must pay phone bill with card)

cards.name: Wells Fargo Autograph
notes: 3x on restaurants, travel, gas, streaming, phone plans, and transit
No annual fee, no foreign transaction fee
Underrated card — one of the best no-annual-fee category earners available

cards.name: Bank of America Travel Rewards
notes: 1.5x on all purchases baseline — up to 2.62x for Preferred Rewards Platinum Honors members
Bank of America Preferred Rewards program significantly boosts earn rate if you have $100k+ with BofA/Merrill
Best for existing BofA/Merrill customers with large balances

cards.name: Bank of America Customized Cash Rewards
notes: 3% in one chosen category: gas, online shopping, dining, travel, drug stores, or home improvement
2% at grocery stores and wholesale clubs (up to $2,500 combined quarterly)
Chosen category can be changed monthly
Good flexible option if your top spend category is one of the 6 choices

cards.name: US Bank Altitude Go
notes: 4x on dining — highest dining rate among no-annual-fee cards
2x on groceries, gas, and streaming
$15 annual streaming credit
Best no-annual-fee card for dining-heavy spenders

cards.name: US Bank Cash+
notes: 5% on two chosen categories (up to $2,000/quarter each): fast food, cell providers, home utilities, ground transport, TV/streaming, department stores, electronics
2% on one everyday category: groceries, restaurants, or gas
1% on everything else
Requires choosing and tracking categories quarterly — not set-and-forget

cards.name: Bilt Mastercard

signup_bonus.note: No traditional signup bonus. Value is in earning points on rent with no transaction fee.

eligibility_notes: Must use card at least 5 times per statement period to earn points on rent
Rent points capped at 100,000 per year
Requires landlord to accept payment via Bilt's system or payment service
notes: Only card that earns points on rent payments with no transaction fee — unique niche
3x on dining, 2x on travel
Bilt Points are among the most valuable transferable currencies: transfer to United, AA, Air Canada, Hyatt, etc.
Must use card 5+ times per billing cycle to earn rent points
Best card for renters who pay $1,500+/month in rent

cards.name: Fidelity Rewards Visa Signature
eligibility_notes: Rewards deposited into a Fidelity brokerage, IRA, or cash management account
notes: Unlimited 2% cash back deposited into Fidelity account — no redemption minimums
No categories to track, no annual fee, no foreign transaction fee
Best for Fidelity account holders who want simple 2% cash back auto-invested

cards.name: Amex Business Gold

signup_bonus.note: High spend requirement — $15,000 in 3 months. Best for businesses with high monthly spend.

eligibility_notes: Business card — requires business income (freelance/side income qualifies)
Amex once-per-lifetime bonus rule applies
notes: 4x automatically applied to your top two highest-spend categories each month from: dining, US gas, US transit, US online advertising/internet services, US shipping (up to $150k/year combined)

4x on 'online advertising' includes internet/cable/phone services and select technology purchases (AWS, Azure, software subscriptions) — only applies if this is one of your top 2 monthly spend categories
$240 annual dining credit ($20/month) brings effective fee to ~$135
Best business card for variable high-spend categories
